title: Lesson 78
paragraph: This lesson practices useful nouns for clothes and accessories.

words.meaning: a soft hat with a front part
words.example: He wears a cap at the park.

words.meaning: special clothes for school or work
words.example: Our uniform is black and white.
I put on pajamas before bed.

words.meaning: a long thing worn around the waist

words.example: I lost one glove in the snow.

words.meaning: a strong shoe that covers the ankle
words.example: Her boot is wet from the rain.
The key is in my pocket.

words.meaning: a small thing used to close clothes
words.example: A button fell off my shirt.

words.meaning: a thing used to open and close clothes or bags
words.example: The zipper on my bag is broken.

words.meaning: the arm part of a shirt or coat
